name: Code Review Pool
description: Dispatcher routes code to specialist reviewers (security, quality, performance), Aggregator merges findings.

data.name: Review Router
data.routingPrompt: Classify the code review task. Determine which specialist reviewers should analyze it based on the code type and concerns. Available specialists: {connected_agent_names}. Respond with JSON: { "selectedAgents": [...ids], "reasoning": "..." }

data.name: Security Reviewer
data.systemPrompt: Review the code for security vulnerabilities: injection attacks, authentication issues, data exposure, OWASP top 10. Provide specific findings with severity ratings.

data.name: Quality Reviewer
data.systemPrompt: Review the code for quality: naming conventions, code duplication, complexity, SOLID principles, error handling. Suggest concrete improvements.

data.name: Performance Reviewer
data.systemPrompt: Review the code for performance issues: N+1 queries, unnecessary allocations, blocking operations, missing caching, inefficient algorithms. Provide benchmarks where possible.

data.name: Review Summary
data.aggregationPrompt: Synthesize the specialist code review findings into a unified report. Organize by severity (critical → info). Deduplicate overlapping findings. Include an executive summary and actionable next steps.
